treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 0.4 mg/kg for 5 days initially, then 2 g/kg over 2 days
treatment_information.treatment_response: Subjective and objective improvement in strength that peaked by 2 weeks and was sustained for 4 months, when symptoms recurred. Subsequent treatments showed marked improvement in strength by 2 weeks. Deep tendon reflexes returned to normal, and the degree of partial motor conduction block declined.

treatment_timeline.event: First evaluated for 7 years of slowly progressive left foot drop, and 2 years of left hand weakness and frequent cramps.
Treated with 0.4 mg/kg of IVIg for 5 days.
Two days after treatment began, subjective and objective improvement in strength.
Re-treated with 2 g/kg of IVIg over 2 days.
Marked subjective and objective improvement in strength by 2 weeks.
Continued to receive 2 g/kg of IVIg every few months, shortened to every 8 weeks, and finally to every 4 weeks.
Trial of azathioprine for over a year.

patient_outcome.final_status: Functioning normally with sustained benefit from IVIg treatments.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Received over 60 IVIg treatments to date.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Remains focal-slow progression over many years.
patient_outcome.recovery_timeline: Improvement in strength peaked by 2 weeks and was sustained for 4 months initially.
